actions.raw_issue: infobox is missing required field(s): license, repository; infobox is sparse — optional fields missing: author, homepage, runtime, tags. Manifest/LICENSE/README enrichment recommended.
actions.remediation: Enrich the infobox data source. Either (a) add the missing fields to `threat-model.yaml` under a top-level `project:` block (keys: name, version, description, author, license, repository, homepage, runtime, tags), or (b) ensure the repository carries the manifests the renderer already understands — package.json / pyproject.toml / Cargo.toml / pom.xml / build.gradle — together with a LICENSE file and a README frontmatter `tags:` list. _read_project_manifest() in compose_threat_model.py is polyglot and will pick these up automatically on the next run.
